title: Update fkey with a values not in the pkey...
poc: create table t1 (id int, name varchar(1024), PRIMARY KEY(id));
create table t2 (id int DEFAULT 13, age int, PRIMARY KEY (ID), FOREIGN KEY(id) REFERENCES t1(id) ON UPDATE SET DEFAULT ON DELETE SET DEFAULT);
update t2 set id = 2 where id =1;
key_bug_features: Updating foreign key with non-existent primary key value
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1 (id int, name varchar(1024), PRIMARY KEY(id));
CREATE TABLE t2 (id int DEFAULT 13, age int, PRIMARY KEY (id), FOREIGN KEY(id) REFERENCES t1(id) ON UPDATE SET DEFAULT ON DELETE SET DEFAULT);
UPDATE t2 SET id = 3 WHERE id = 1;
